headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Monster Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $90 to $85.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Monster Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $85

headline: Coca-Cola Slips Below 50-Day SMA: Buy Opportunity or Wait for Now?
summary: KO falls below its 50-day SMA amid macroeconomic headwinds and estimate cuts, but trading above the 200-day average keeps the long-term uptrend intact.
